basic_details.job_title: Assam University Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 123 Professor, Assistant Professor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Assam University invites online applications for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor positions across multiple departments. This is a regular teaching recruitment with postings at Silchar HQ and Diphu Campus. DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

application_fee.sc_fee: Exempted from fee (Rs. 500/- as postal expenses only)
application_fee.details: Fee to be paid online through payment gateway.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill UGC / University norms as on the closing date. | Professor: Ph.D. degree with minimum 10 years teaching/research experience and significant publications. Associate Professor: Ph.D. with minimum 8 years experience and good publication record. Assistant Professor: Master’s degree with NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations. | Areas of Specializations are specified department-wise (e.g., Physical Anthropology for Anthropology, Microbial Ecology for Ecology & Environmental Science, etc.). Detailed specializations are available in the notification. | Reservation applies as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD.

selection_process: Screening of applications by duly constituted committees. Interview for shortlisted candidates. Mere fulfillment of minimum qualifications does not guarantee call for interview. University may conduct written test if applications are large in number.
how_to_apply: Fill the online application form carefully (Part-A & Part-B).
Upload photograph, signature, and all relevant documents.
Download the PDF of the submitted application.

Submit Hard Copy (mandatory) along with self-attested documents to: Deputy Registrar, Room No. 103, Raja Rammohan Roy Administrative Building, Assam University, Silchar – 788011, Cachar, Assam by Speed Post / Registered Post.
Proof of age, educational qualifications, experience certificates, caste/disability certificates, publications, etc.
important_instructions: Hard copy submission is mandatory. Separate application for each post. Canvassing in any form leads to disqualification. University reserves the right to withdraw/cancel posts. No correspondence regarding rejection will be entertained. Jurisdiction for disputes: High Court, Guwahati.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Assam University Silchar Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Assam University Silchar Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Assam University Silchar Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application submission is 10 July 2026 (11:59 PM). Candidates must also ensure the hard copy reaches the university address within the stipulated time. It is advisable to complete the process early to avoid last-minute technical issues on the Samarth portal.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in Assam University Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are over 100 vacancies across Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor posts at Silchar HQ and Diphu Campus, including regular, backlog reserved, and leave vacancies. Detailed department-wise breakup is available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: General, OBC, and EWS candidates have to pay Rs. 1,000/-. SC, ST, PwBD, and Women candidates are exempted from the application fee but must pay Rs. 500/- as postal expenses.

faq.question: Q4. Is hard copy submission mandatory for Assam University application?
faq.answer: Yes, submission of the hard copy of the online application along with self-attested documents is mandatory. Applications without hard copy will not be considered.

faq.question: Q5. What is the pay scale for Professor at Assam University?
faq.answer: Professor posts are in Academic Level-14 with pay matrix of Rs. 1,44,200 – 2,18,200 plus allowances as per 7th CPC and UGC norms.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum qualifications for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: As per UGC Regulations – Master’s degree with NET/SET or Ph.D. in the relevant subject. Specific specializations are mentioned for many departments.

faq.question: Q7. Can I apply for posts in both Silchar HQ and Diphu Campus?
faq.answer: Yes, but separate applications must be submitted for each post/campus with the correct post code.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for teaching positions at Assam University?
faq.answer: There is no upper age limit for Professor and Associate Professor posts. For Assistant Professor, age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q9. How will the selection be done?
faq.answer: Selection is based on screening of applications followed by personal interview. The University may conduct a written test if the number of applications is large.

faq.question: Q10. Where should I send the hard copy of the application?
faq.answer: The hard copy must be sent to Deputy Registrar, Room No. 103, Raja Rammohan Roy Administrative Building, Assam University, Silchar – 788011, Cachar, Assam.
